title: acetosella psoralioides
intro: Acetosella psoralioides, also known as the yellow bird's eye or goldentop, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oxalidaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a lymphatic and circulatory stimulant, as well as a diuretic. The health benefits of Acetosella psoralioides include its potential to treat conditions such as arthritis, gout, and kidney stones, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Acetosella psoralioides can be prepared into herbal remedies in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions.
